heading: Survey system extended to Alaska
label: 751a Survey system extended to Alaska
text: The system of public land surveys is extended to the Territory of Alaska.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , Territories and Insular Possessions.section 351 of Title 48Section is from the Sundry Civil Appropriation Act, 1900.
